title: Subaltern
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Subaltern''' was a rank among the [[warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Roughly analogous to [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeants]] or [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenants]], subalterns commanded squads of warriors in battle, or were in charge of troops guarding a location.

[[Supreme Commander]] [[Nas Choka]] personally oversaw the "elevation" of four subalterns. Subalterns Doshao, Sata'ak, Harmae, and Tugorn were involved, respectively, in the victory over the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] at [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], the attack on [[Ithor/Legends|Ithor]], the taking of prisoners at [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]], and Tugorn helped sow [[Belkadan/Legends|Belkadan]] in addition to participating in the overwhelming victory on the system of [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]].

[[Bur'lorr]] was a subaltern who participated in the [[Battle of New Holgha]], where he was attacked by a cadre of [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Commando/Legends|commandos]], and [[Death/Legends|killed]] when [[Goran Beviin]]'s [[Crushgaunt/Legends|crushgaunts]] squashed his throat. [[S'yito]] was a subaltern stationed on [[Selvaris]] during the latter stages of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Military-stub}}
